post.description: Executes the default NAT workflow from the loaded configuration
Executes the default NAT workflow from the loaded configuration

Stream raw intermediate steps without any step adaptor translations.
Use filter_steps query parameter to filter steps by type (comma-separated list) or                         set to 'none' to suppress all intermediate steps.

schema.title: Response Get Jobs Evaluate Jobs Get

post.description: Evaluates the performance and accuracy of the workflow on a dataset

get.description: Handles the authorization code and state returned from the Authorization Code Grant Flow.

job_id.title: Job Id
job_id.description: Unique identifier for the evaluation job

sync_timeout.title: Sync Timeout
sync_timeout.description: Attempt to perform the job synchronously up until `sync_timeout` sectonds, if the job hasn't been completed by then a job_id will be returned with a status code of 202.

expiry_seconds.title: Expiry Seconds
expiry_seconds.description: Optional time (in seconds) before the job expires. Clamped between 600 (10 min) and 86400 (24h).

AsyncGenerateResponse.title: AsyncGenerateResponse
AsyncGenerateResponse.description: Response model for the async generation endpoint.

job_id.title: Job Id
job_id.description: Unique identifier for the evaluation job

status.title: Status
status.description: Current status of the evaluation job

error.title: Error
error.description: Error message if the job failed

created_at.title: Created At
created_at.description: Timestamp when the job was created

updated_at.title: Updated At
updated_at.description: Timestamp when the job was last updated

expires_at.title: Expires At
expires_at.description: Timestamp when the job will expire

output.title: Output
output.description: Output of the generate request, this is only available if the job completed successfully.

model.title: Model
model.description: name of the model to use

frequency_penalty.title: Frequency Penalty
frequency_penalty.description: Penalty for new tokens based on frequency in text

logit_bias.title: Logit Bias
logit_bias.description: Modify likelihood of specified tokens appearing

top_logprobs.title: Top Logprobs
top_logprobs.description: Number of most likely tokens to return

max_tokens.title: Max Tokens
max_tokens.description: Maximum number of tokens to generate

n.title: N
n.description: Number of chat completion choices to generate

presence_penalty.title: Presence Penalty
presence_penalty.description: Penalty for new tokens based on presence in text

stream.title: Stream
stream.description: Whether to stream partial message deltas

tools.title: Tools
tools.description: List of tools the model may call

parallel_tool_calls.title: Parallel Tool Calls
parallel_tool_calls.description: Whether to enable parallel function calling

ChatRequest.title: ChatRequest
ChatRequest.description:
ChatRequest is a data model that represents a request to the NAT chat API.
Fully compatible with OpenAI Chat Completions API specification.

ChatResponse.title: ChatResponse
ChatResponse.description:
ChatResponse is a data model that represents a response from the NAT chat API.
Fully compatible with OpenAI Chat Completions API specification.

ChatResponseChunk.title: ChatResponseChunk
ChatResponseChunk.description:
ChatResponseChunk is a data model that represents a response chunk from the NAT chat streaming API.
Fully compatible with OpenAI Chat Completions API specification.

config_file.title: Config File
config_file.description: Path to the configuration file for evaluation

job_id.title: Job Id
job_id.description: Unique identifier for the evaluation job

reps.title: Reps
reps.description: Number of repetitions for the evaluation, defaults to 1

expiry_seconds.title: Expiry Seconds
expiry_seconds.description: Optional time (in seconds) before the job expires. Clamped between 600 (10 min) and 86400 (24h).

EvaluateRequest.title: EvaluateRequest
EvaluateRequest.description: Request model for the evaluate endpoint.

EvaluateResponse.title: EvaluateResponse
EvaluateResponse.description: Response model for the evaluate endpoint.

job_id.title: Job Id
job_id.description: Unique identifier for the evaluation job

status.title: Status
status.description: Current status of the evaluation job

error.title: Error
error.description: Error message if the job failed

created_at.title: Created At
created_at.description: Timestamp when the job was created

updated_at.title: Updated At
updated_at.description: Timestamp when the job was last updated

expires_at.title: Expires At
expires_at.description: Timestamp when the job will expire

config_file.title: Config File
config_file.description: Path to the configuration file used for evaluation

output_path.title: Output Path
output_path.description: Path to the output file if the job completed successfully

EvaluateStatusResponse.title: EvaluateStatusResponse
EvaluateStatusResponse.description: Response model for the evaluate status endpoint.

ResponseIntermediateStep.title: ResponseIntermediateStep
ResponseIntermediateStep.description: ResponseSerializedStep is a data model that represents a serialized step in the NAT chat streaming API.
